---
title: "affine_grid"
generated: true
description: "Absolute sample coordinates of a homogeneous transform on a grid."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.transform`](../nitrix-geometry-transform.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:affine_grid -->
```python
affine_grid(matrix: Float[Array, 'd1 d1'], spatial_shape: Sequence[int], *, center: Optional[Float[Array, 'd']] = None) -> Float[Array, '*spatial d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:affine_grid -->
Absolute sample coordinates of a homogeneous transform on a grid.

Maps each output voxel $i$ to $M (i - c) + t + c$ -- the
coordinate [`spatial_transform`](../nitrix-geometry-grid/spatial_transform.qmd) samples the moving image at.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:affine_grid -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `matrix` | `Float` | `d1` × `d1` | — | Homogeneous transform, `(ndim + 1, ndim + 1)`. |
| `spatial_shape` | `Sequence[int]` | — | — | Output grid shape (length `ndim`). |
| `center` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'd']]` | — | `None` | Rotation/scaling centre. `None` (default) uses the grid centre `(shape - 1) / 2` -- the registration convention (rotate about the image centre, not the voxel origin). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial` × `d`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:affine_grid -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `d1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
